legal.title: Legal Information
legal.iap_disclaimer: Payment will be charged to iTunes Account at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24-hours before the end of the current period. Account will be charged for renewal within 24-hours prior to the end of the current period, and identify the cost of the renewal. Subscriptions may be managed by the user and auto-renewal may be turned off by going to the user's Account Settings after purchase.

chat.welcome: Hello, I'm Red, your urban experience guide. How can I help you today?
chat.default_fallback: I understand your request. As your Urban Guide assistant, I'm here to guide you through the most pleasant and comfortable routes.
chat.faq_sos: If needed, you can notify your contacts quickly from the dashboard. I've alerted your priority contacts to watch your journey.
chat.faq_route: I can calculate the most comfortable route for you. Open the map and select your destination; I'll prioritize well-lit streets and pleasant areas.
chat.faq_family: You can see your group's real-time location from the 'Circle' tab on the main map.
chat.faq_premium: The Premium subscription unlocks unlimited real-time accompaniment and improved route visualization.
chat.faq_greeting: Hi! I'm Red. I'm with you on your journey. Is there anything specific I can help you with now?
chat.not_found_prompt: Didn't find what you were looking for?
chat.contact_support_desc: Contact our Urban Guide 24/7 technical support team directly.
chat.powered_by: Powered by Urban Guide AI Engine
chat.name: RED AI

eula.title: Legal Notice
eula.subtitle: License Agreement and Disclaimer
eula.disclaimer_quote: This application does not replace emergency services nor is it affiliated with public authorities.
eula.description_1: Urban Guide is an urban experience and mobility application that allows you to visualize illuminated routes and share your location with trusted contacts.
eula.description_2: In case of emergency, the user must directly contact official services (e.g., 112 in Spain).
eula.description_3: The notification functionality facilitates communication with contacts, but does not guarantee response, follow-up, or intervention by authorities.
eula.location_desc_1: Shared location information is private between users and aims to improve the shared travel experience.
eula.location_desc_2: The developer is not responsible for risk situations or location transmission failures caused by connectivity or technical limitations.
eula.privacy_desc: We strictly comply with GDPR. Your location data is yours and is only shared with those you choose within the application. You can withdraw your consent at any time from the settings.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.support_desc: Our support team is available 24/7 for Premium users.

questions.q: How do I activate a journey notice?
questions.a: Press and hold the center button on the map. Your trusted contacts will receive a notification to see your journey in real-time until you reach your destination.

questions.q: Can my group see where I am always?
questions.a: Only if you share your location with them. You can activate or deactivate real-time visibility from your profile privacy settings.
The Premium Network includes lighting detection AI, improved route visualization, management of multiple trusted groups, and priority access to new urban routes.

questions.q: How do I add trusted contacts?
questions.a: Go to the 'Group Management' section in the main menu and press the '+' button. They will receive an invitation to join your urban experience group.

greencarpet.eco_elite_desc: You actively contribute to the development of comfortable cities.

contacts.footer_disclaimer: These contacts will be notified automatically if you activate a journey alert. Your data is protected and only shared with your consent.

contacts.add_prompt_phone: Enter their phone number (with country code e.g., +34)
contacts.sync_alert: {{name}} uses Urban Guide! We have sent them a sync request. Meanwhile, your alert will work traditionally (SMS).
contacts.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from your trusted contacts?

privacy.title: PRIVACY POLICY – URBAN GUIDE
privacy.subtitle: URBAN EXPERIENCE AND LIGHTING GUIDE
privacy.intro_p1: At URBAN GUIDE, we consider the privacy of our users as an absolute right. Every piece of data you share with us is treated with the highest level of legal and technical protection, ensuring that your personal information is always under your control while you enjoy a better experience moving through the city.
privacy.intro_p2: Our application strictly and verifiably complies with all relevant laws and regulations, including:
regulations_list: Organic Law 3/2018 on Protection of Personal Data (LOPDGDD).
Applicable Spanish fiscal, commercial, and sectoral regulations.
Guidelines and recommendations of the European Data Protection Board (EDPB).
OECD Privacy Principles and international best practices.
ISO and EN information security and data encryption standards.
E-commerce, payment, and consumer protection legislation.
privacy.commitment_title: At URBAN GUIDE, we are committed to your peace of mind and absolute control over your data:
commitments_list: Total transparency: you will always know what data we collect and how we use it.
Maximum security: encryption in transit and at rest, reinforced authentication.
Anonymization and minimization: data shared with third parties is always aggregated or anonymized.
Guaranteed user rights: access, rectification, deletion, and more, at any time.
Ethical and professional commitment: no data will be used for unauthorized purposes.
privacy.intro_footer: Our goal is for every user to feel protected, informed, and secure from the first moment.
privacy.section1_content: The data controller is URBAN GUIDE, owner of the mobile application aimed at improving urban experience through geolocation technology and illuminated route recommendation.
privacy.section2_content: Processing of personal data is carried out in accordance with GDPR, LOPDGDD, and applicable Spanish regulations.
privacy.section3_content: URBAN GUIDE processes personal data respecting principles of lawfulness, purpose limitation, data minimization, accuracy, storage limitation, integrity, and proactive responsibility.
privacy.section4_footer: URBAN GUIDE expressly declares that it does not process special categories of personal data (Article 9 GDPR).
section5_list: Provision of urban guide service and recommended route visualization.
Notification to trusted contacts with real-time location transmission.
Calculation and recommendation of well-lit and busy routes.
Identification of interest and visibility zones.
Secure sharing of anonymized data with third parties for studies.
Optional commercial use with explicit consent.
section6_list: Explicit consent for geolocation and sensitive data (Article 6.1.a GDPR).
Legitimate interest in security and fraud prevention.
section7_list: Real-time location: while the service is active.
Identifying data: during contract and up to 3 years after.
privacy.section7_footer: Once periods end, data will be deleted or irreversibly anonymized.
privacy.section8_content: URBAN GUIDE may send push notifications related to service security and policy updates. You can manage these in settings.
privacy.section9_content: You can exercise your rights of access, rectification, deletion, and portability by emailing soporte@urbanguide.app.
privacy.section10_content: URBAN GUIDE reserves the right to modify this policy. We will notify you of any substantial changes.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1_content: By accessing and using Urban Guide, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.
terms.section2_content: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials (information or software) on the Urban Guide application for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title.
terms.section3_content: The materials on the Urban Guide application are provided 'as is'. Urban Guide makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaims and negates all other warranties including, without limitation, implied warranties or conditions of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement of intellectual property or other violation of rights.
terms.section4_content: In no event shall Urban Guide or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on Urban Guide.
terms.section5_content: Our services include safety and location features. You acknowledge that these services rely on network connectivity and GPS, and should not be considered as a substitute for professional emergency services.
terms.section6_content: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Spain and you irrevocably submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in that State or location.
terms.section7_p1: Urban Guide offers auto-renewable premium subscriptions ('Urban Guide Pro'). By purchasing a subscription, payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at the confirmation of purchase.
section7_list: The subscription automatically renews unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period, indicating the renewal cost.
You can manage and cancel your subscriptions by going to your Account Settings on the App Store after purchase.
Any unused portion of a free trial period, if offered, will be forfeited when the user purchases a subscription to that publication.
